title: Corporate Actions Analyst (1-Year Contract) (No Experience Needed)
description:
about the company

Our client is an institution in the wealth management group, focusing exclusively on bespoke private banking and holistic advisory for a global high-net-worth clientele.

about the job

  • Coordinate with internal units and external custodians, agents, and brokers to uphold organizational standards.

  • Manage and address inquiries promptly, ensuring timely responses or status updates.

  • Monitor daily SWIFT messages and process/reconcile Corporate Action positions and entitlements.

  • Ensure accurate, timely posting of entries and conduct daily reviews of reconciliation breaks for prompt resolution.

  • Audit reconciliations before market deadlines to mitigate operational risks and losses related to voluntary events.

  • Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) initiatives as required.

  • Maintain high standards of integrity, due care, and fair dealing while ensuring full compliance with laws and risk protocols.

  • Partner with relevant teams to satisfy all regulatory reporting and requirements.

skills and experience required

  • Strong communicators who can engage effectively across all organizational levels.

  • Self-motivated professionals

  • Proactive, independent thinkers who remain dedicated team players in high-pressure environments.

  • Familiarity with SWIFT messaging standards (MT56x/54x) is a plus.

  • Background in bond restructurings and filing claims for defaulted instruments is highly valued.

To apply online please use the 'apply' function.

(EA: 94C3609/ R24124496)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
